{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Beacon (Cradle)
| introduced = Bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|A beacon is a sealed marble containing [[Suriel]]'s power.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18">''Bloodline'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
